data.title: Blockstream CEO Highlights ETF Adoption as Key Market Catalyst for Bitcoin
data.description: Blockstream CEO Adam Back has emphasized the significance of institutional adoption of Bitcoin through ETFs as a crucial market catalyst. According to Foresight News, Back noted that the progress is slower than anticipated, with fund managers yet to act on BlackRock's suggested allocation ratio of 2%-4%. Despite the potential impact of ETFs on the market, the pace of adoption remains a concern.

data.title: Monex Europe Analyst: UK Pound Remains Fragile Amid Political and Economic Uncertainty
data.description: On April 29, Monex Europe analysts noted that despite the UK Parliament's House of Commons voting against referring Prime Minister Starmer for an ethics investigation, the British pound remains vulnerable. According to Jin10, the analysts highlighted in a report that the Bank of England is likely to keep interest rates unchanged on Thursday, emphasizing that the current energy price shock may be temporary, which could dampen expectations for aggressive rate hikes. Prior to this, the U.S. Federal Reserve is expected to announce its rate decision at 2 a.m. Beijing time on Thursday, likely maintaining rates and stressing patience for future actions, which may support the U.S. dollar. Meanwhile, geopolitical headlines and poor risk sentiment are expected to continue weighing on the pound.

data.title: Russia's GDP Growth Forecast for 2026
data.description: Russia's GDP is projected to grow between 0.5% and 1% in 2026, according to the Russian Federal Savings Bank.

data.title: Whale Deposits USDC and Opens Leveraged Short Position on Brent Oil
data.description: A significant cryptocurrency whale has deposited 2 million USDC into HyperLiquid, according to Foresight News. The whale has also initiated a leveraged short position on 80,000 units of Brent Oil, utilizing a 3x leverage strategy.

data.title: 0G Labs Launches Privacy Computing Service for AI Developers
data.description:
0G Labs has officially launched its 0G Private Computer, offering privacy inference services based on Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) technology for AI agents and developers. According to ChainCatcher, users can access the service through pc.0g.ai.

The product utilizes a hardware isolation environment composed of Intel TDX CPUs and NVIDIA H100/H200 GPUs. All inference requests are completed within the TEE, ensuring encrypted transmission of input data and signature verification of output results. This setup prevents service providers from directly accessing user data.

Currently, the platform supports models such as DeepSeek DeepSeek Chat V3, Alibaba Qwen3.6 Plus, Zhipu AI GLM-5-FP8, Qwen3-VL-30B, OpenAI Whisper-large-v3, and z-image. It also offers an interface compatible with OpenAI API, allowing developers to migrate by modifying the base URL.

data.title: Maritime Piracy Resurges Off Somalia Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran is contributing to a rise in maritime piracy off the coast of Somalia, according to reports from an EU naval force patrolling the area. Bloomberg posted on X that the instability in the region has led to increased pirate activity, posing significant threats to international shipping lanes. The EU naval force has been actively monitoring the situation, aiming to curb the resurgence of piracy that had previously been under control. The conflict in Iran has disrupted regional security, creating opportunities for pirates to exploit vulnerable vessels. Efforts are underway to enhance maritime security and protect shipping routes from further attacks.

data.title: Lido Proposes Temporary Adjustment to EarnETH Loss Protection Threshold
data.description:
Lido's research forum has introduced a new proposal suggesting that the DAO temporarily lower the loss protection trigger threshold for the EarnETH treasury in response to the Kelp incident. According to Foresight News, the current rules stipulate that Lido Earn's protection mechanism activates only when treasury losses exceed 1% of holdings. However, the proposal notes that if the rsETH shortage is resolved through DeFi United, actual losses might be below 1%. To ensure full compensation for EarnETH users, the proposal recommends a one-time exception to utilize the initial loss fund to cover losses below the 1% threshold. The estimated residual borrowing rate loss is between 400 and 600 ETH.

The proposal emphasizes that this measure is a one-time arrangement for user protection, brand reputation, and business considerations, and does not alter the general 1% rule. Given that the rsETH issue is expected to be resolved within 5 to 10 days, and the standard voting window is 7 days, the proposal is time-sensitive.

data.title: Asian Development Bank Reports Spillover Effects of Fuel Prices and Inflation in Asian Countries
data.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) has reported that the spillover effects of rising fuel prices and inflation are becoming evident in Asian countries. According to Jin10, the ADB highlighted the impact of these economic factors on the region's economies, noting that the increased costs are affecting various sectors. The report suggests that the ongoing inflationary pressures and elevated fuel prices are contributing to economic challenges across Asia, potentially influencing growth and stability in the coming years. The ADB's analysis underscores the need for strategic measures to mitigate these effects and support economic resilience in the region.

data.title: Bitget will list AIGENSYN spot trading
data.description: Bitget will be listing Gensyn (AIGENSYN) in the AI ​​zone. Deposits are now open, and trading will open at 19:00 (UTC+8) today.

data.title: Asian Development Bank Forecasts Inflation Rise in Asia-Pacific for 2026
data.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) has projected that inflation in the Asia-Pacific region will increase to 5.2% in 2026. According to Jin10, this forecast contrasts with an earlier stable scenario prediction of 3.6% for the same period.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Analog Chipmakers See Pre-Market Gains on NXP's Positive Forecast
data.description: U.S. analog chip manufacturers experienced a rise in pre-market trading as NXP Semiconductors (NXPI.O) projected higher-than-expected profits and revenue for the second quarter. According to Jin10, ON Semiconductor (ON.O) saw a 4.6% increase, Texas Instruments (TXN.O) rose by 0.6%, and Microchip Technology (MCHP.O) gained 2.5%.

data.title: Trump Urges Iran to Decide on Nuclear Deal Amidst Turmoil
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has commented on the current situation in Iran, describing it as chaotic. According to Odaily, Trump stated on Truth Social that Iran is uncertain about how to sign a nuclear agreement and urged the country to make a decision promptly.

data.title: DOGE broke through $0.105, with a daily increase of over 6%.
data.description: OKX data shows that DOGE has broken through $0.105 and is currently trading at $0.1057, with a 24-hour increase of over 6%.

data.title: U.S. Court Sentences Maximilien de Hoop Cartier to Eight Years in Crypto Laundering Case
data.description: A U.S. court has sentenced Maximilien de Hoop Cartier to eight years in prison for his involvement in a cryptocurrency laundering scheme that allegedly processed over $470 million in drug proceeds. According to NS3.AI, Cartier admitted guilt to charges of operating an unlicensed money transmitting business and conspiracy to commit bank fraud. In addition to the prison sentence, the court mandated the forfeiture of approximately $2.36 million and specific shell company bank accounts linked to the operation.

data.title: Silicon Motion Shares Surge 21.9% Pre-Market Following Strong Q1 Revenue
data.description: Silicon Motion, a company listed in the United States, saw its shares rise by 21.9% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, the company's first-quarter revenue exceeded expectations, contributing to the positive market response.

data.title: Trump: Iran should sign a nuclear-free agreement as soon as possible
data.description: Trump posted on Truth Social that the current situation in Iran is chaotic, and that Iran "does not know how to sign a nuclear-free agreement," urging it to make a decision as soon as possible.

data.title: Eurozone March M3 Money Supply Growth Exceeds Expectations
data.description: The Eurozone's M3 money supply growth rate for March was reported at 3.2%, surpassing the anticipated 3.1% and the previous value of 3.00%. According to Jin10, this data reflects a slight increase in the monetary expansion within the Eurozone, indicating a potential shift in economic conditions.

data.title: OpenGradient Completes First Season OPG Token Distribution
data.description: OpenGradient has announced the completion of its first season OPG token distribution. According to Foresight News, the project is preparing to commence its second season of distribution. The development of the project's mainnet is also progressing steadily.

data.title: STOCKS | Seagate Technology Shares Surge 18% Pre-Market on Strong Q3 Revenue
data.description: Seagate Technology (STX.O), a leading storage chip manufacturer, saw its shares rise nearly 18% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, the company's revenue for the third fiscal quarter of 2026 reached $3.11 billion, surpassing expectations.

data.title: NXP Semiconductors Shares Surge 17.2% Pre-Market on Strong Q2 Profit and Revenue Forecasts
data.description: NXP Semiconductors saw its shares rise by 17.2% in pre-market trading. According to Jin10, the company has projected that both its profit and revenue for the second quarter will exceed expectations.
